case_title: C.C.S.F. DEPT OF SOCIAL SERVICES VS MATHEWS, TRACY B.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,223.00 FILED BY C.C.S.F. DEPT OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT MATHEWS, TRACY B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MATHEWS, TRACY B.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C.C.S.F. DEPT OF SOCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATHEWS, TRACY B. $2,223.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,243.50, PAYMENT OF $50. EVERY 2 WEEKS, BEGINNING ON 10/15/96 AND ON 30TH & 15TH OF EACH MONTH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MATHEWS, TRACY B.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MATHEWS, TRACY B.
